HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[network-effective] Prioritizing likely public-IP reachability by combining visible endpoint and NSG evidence.
ho-azure network-effective

╭──────────────┬────────────┬────────┬──────────────┬─────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│asset         │endpoint    │priority│internet ports│narrower ports   │why it matters                                                                                                                                                                                                                     │
├──────────────┼────────────┼────────┼──────────────┼─────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│vm-web-01     │52.160.10.20│high    │TCP/22        │TCP/443, TCP/8080│Asset 'vm-web-01' endpoint 52.160.10.20 has internet-facing allow evidence on TCP/22 and narrower allow evidence on TCP/443, TCP/8080. Treat this as visible Azure network triage signal, not proof of full effective reachability.│
│aci-public-api│52.160.10.30│low     │              │                 │Asset 'aci-public-api' endpoint 52.160.10.30 is visible as a public IP path, but no inbound-rule evidence was surfaced from the current read path. Treat this as a low-confidence triage clue rather than proof of exposure.       │
╰──────────────┴────────────┴────────┴──────────────┴─────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Takeaway: 2 public-IP exposure summaries visible; 1 high, 0 medium, 1 low, and 1 show broad internet-facing allow evidence.
